prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第40名，近年排名稳定在38–40名区间，属中上游985；2026年声誉 评价偏正面，主要源于硕士毕业生在论文致谢中感谢保卫部默许拾荒老人进校等人文关怀事件，对报考心理有正面影响；抖音热度排名第53/106（较热），关注度中等偏上；未见 明显投档断档记录；生态学A+、草学A+、化学A-、地理学A-、生物学A-，共5个A-及以上学科，草学与生态学为全国顶尖，与招生专业中的大气科学类、生物科 学类、化学类等高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等物理类相关专业2026年均为高热推荐，报考热度持续升温；本省2026年物理类考生估 算约36.5万人，较2025年36.3万人小幅增加约0.5%，竞争略有加剧；省控线2025年物理类本科批459分、特殊类型499分，近年稳中有升；兰州大学位于甘肃，在 河北省招生占比约2.3%–3.0%（2021–2025年），属中等偏低水平；西北地区高校对河北考生吸引力一般，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、 2026年计划小幅缩招（-3.7%）、本省考生总数微增、专业热度升温及声誉偏正面等因素，在2025年基准15775名基础上预计竞争略加剧但受缩招对冲；预测最低位次约15477名， 区间14977–15977名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 10760 → 11399 → 13587 → 13836 → 15775, showing a continuous backward trend. Over the past 4 years, the cumulative backward shift is about 5015 places, with an average annual shift of about 1254 places. The 2025 baseline is about 15775, the highest (i.e., hardest to enter) in the past 5 years. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 134 in 2021, 137 in 2022, 127 in 2023, 114 in 2024, and 163 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 157, a decrease of 6 (-3.7%) compared to 2025, a slight reduction in enrollment, easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 40th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, stable in the 38–40 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 985 universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is relatively positive, mainly due to incidents of humanities care, such as master's graduates thanking the security department in their thesis acknowledgments for allowing a scrap collector to enter the campus, which positively affects application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking: 53/106 (relatively hot), with moderate to high attention. No obvious admission cutoff gaps recorded. Ecology A+, Grass Science A+, Chemistry A-, Geography A-, Biology A-, a total of 5 A- and above disciplines. Grass Science and Ecology are top in the country, highly related to enrollment majors such as Atmospheric Science, Biological Science, and Chemistry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, Physics Category-related majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are all highly recommended, with application heat continuing to rise. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 365,000, a slight increase of about 0.5% from 363,000 in 2025, intensifying competition slightly. The provincial control line for Physics Category in 2025 was 459 for undergraduate batch and 499 for special types, with a steady upward trend in recent years. Lanzhou University is located in Gansu, with a enrollment proportion in Hebei Province of about 2.3%–3.0% (2021–2025), which is moderately low. The attractiveness of universities in the northwest region to Hebei candidates is average, with limited impact from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (-3.7%), a slight increase in the total number of candidates in the province, rising major popularity, and a relatively positive reputation, competition is expected to intensify slightly but offset by the enrollment reduction. Based on the 2025 baseline of 15775, the predicted minimum ranking is about 15477, with a range of 14977–15977.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 14977–15977, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<14977), you can focus on popular engineering majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information. If your ranking is in the middle of the range, prioritize Lanzhou University's advantageous disciplines such as Clinical Medicine and Atmospheric Science. If your ranking is near the upper limit (>15977), it is advisable to use Tier 3 majors as safety, while also considering relatively lower-threshold majors like Business Administration and Economics.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
2021–2025 minimum rankings for History Category approximately 1640→1755→2432→2189→1976, overall significant fluctuation, with a notable backward shift in 2023 (rank 2432), and recovery in 2024–2025; 2025 baseline approximately rank 1976.
2. [Enrollment Plan] Provincial History Category plan: 2021–2023 all 31 students, 2024 30 students, 2025 22 students; 2026 plan 32 students, an increase of 10 students (+45.5%) compared to 2025, substantial expansion, significantly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 2026 reputation evaluation is relatively positive, humanities care events enhance school image; Douyin popularity ranking 53/106 (moderately hot), attention level moderate; no obvious record of admission cutoff breaks; advantageous disciplines such as Ecology A+, Grass Science A+ have low correlation with History Category enrollment majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, etc.), but Lanzhou University's comprehensive 985 disciplinary foundation provides overall support for liberal arts programs; 985, 211, Double First-Class; 2026 Soft Science main ranking approximately 40th, stable in the 38–40 range in recent years.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law 2026 recommended (slightly hot), Chinese Language/Chinese recommended (slightly hot), popularity of popular liberal arts majors stable; provincial 2026 History Category examinees estimated approximately 245,000, a slight increase of about 0.6% from 2025's 244,000; provincial control line 2025 History Category undergraduate batch 477 points, special type 527 points, stable with slight increase in recent years; Lanzhou University located in Gansu, enrollment proportion in Hebei Province approximately 2.3%–3.0%, moderately low level; northwestern universities have average appeal to Hebei liberal arts examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering historical ranking fluctuations, significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+45.5%), slight increase in provincial examinees, and stable popularity of popular liberal arts majors, the intensified competition effect due to expansion is significant; based on the 2025 baseline of rank 1976, the ranking is expected to shift backward noticeably; predicted minimum ranking approximately 2545, range 2087–3003.
